coa.title: Chart of Accounts
coa.subtitle: Set up the governed account structure that later finance posting and reporting will use.

gl.title: General Ledger
gl.subtitle: Review the shell for tenant-facing ledger inquiry and posting controls before the finance engine is implemented.

reports.title: Financial Reports
reports.subtitle: Prepare the reporting space for trial balance, profit and loss, balance sheet, and finance inquiry screens.

ar.title: AR Aging
ar.subtitle: Reserve the receivables workspace for customer balances, aging buckets, and follow-up review.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.subtitle: Reserve the expense and petty cash workspace for the basic v1 cost-control flows.

bankRecon.title: Bank Reconciliation
bankRecon.subtitle: Reserve the future bank matching and reconciliation workspace for the v2 treasury phase.

ap.title: Accounts Payable
ap.subtitle: Reserve the supplier payable workspace for v2 invoice, payment, and aging flows.

po.title: Purchase Orders
po.subtitle: Reserve the procurement workspace for supplier ordering and receipt controls planned for v2.

branchPl.title: Branch P&L
branchPl.subtitle: Branch profitability combines direct posted finance truth with the latest posted governed allocation run, while costing remains visible as a separate audited layer.

list.title: Branch Profitability
list.subtitle: This view preserves direct finance truth, then layers the latest posted governed allocation run on top of it.
list.empty: No posted branch profitability data found.

allocationRule.title: Create Allocation Rule
allocationRule.subtitle: Define a governed branch profitability allocation rule without hiding direct finance truth.

allocationRun.title: Create Allocation Run
allocationRun.subtitle: Open a draft allocation run before adding branch allocation lines.

allocationLine.title: Add Allocation Line
allocationLine.subtitle: Capture an auditable manual allocation line into a draft run.

costComponent.title: Create Cost Component
costComponent.subtitle: Define the approved laundry cost component catalog for rerunnable cost runs.

costRun.title: Create Cost Run
costRun.subtitle: Open a draft cost run before loading detailed cost rows.

costRunDetail.title: Add Cost Run Detail
costRunDetail.subtitle: Record audited costing detail rows into a draft cost run.

allocationRules.title: Allocation Rules
allocationRules.subtitle: Active profitability allocation rules available for new draft runs.

allocationRuns.title: Allocation Runs
allocationRuns.subtitle: Draft and posted branch profitability allocation runs.

costRuns.title: Cost Runs
costRuns.subtitle: Draft and posted laundry cost runs with auditable totals.

costSummary.title: Latest Cost Summary
costSummary.subtitle: Branch totals from the latest posted cost run.
